title: Handling a Complaint 处理投诉

lines.en: I am very unhappy with the service I received.
lines.zh: 我对收到的服务非常不满意。

lines.en: I am sorry to hear that. Please tell me what happened.
lines.zh: 很抱歉听到这个。请告诉我发生了什么。

lines.en: My order arrived late and the package was damaged.
lines.zh: 我的订单送晚了，而且包装还破损了。

lines.en: That is completely unacceptable. I sincerely apologize.
lines.zh: 这完全不能接受。我真诚地向您道歉。

lines.en: Of course. I will process that right away.
And I hope this does not happen again.
lines.zh: 而且我希望这种事不要再发生。

lines.en: I assure you we will improve our delivery process.
lines.zh: 我向您保证，我们会改进配送流程。

lines.en: Thank you for handling this quickly.
